title: dubautia linearis subsp. hillebrandii
intro: Dubautia linearis subsp. hillebrandii, also known as the Hillebrand's silversword, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. It is native to the island of Maui in Hawaii and is a rare and endangered species. The medicinal properties of Dubautia linearis subsp. hillebrandii include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
